text.title: Project Closure with Lessons Extraction Examples
text.summary: Worked closure report for a distressed-project rescue.

example.title: Phoenix rescue — 90-day distressed-project closure
example.context: Checkout-redesign distressed project rescued in 90 days; p95 latency goal partially met; vendor migration was the variance.
example.code:
# Closure Report — Phoenix rescue
Sponsor: VP Engineering Date: 2026-04-30 Outcome: partial
## Outcome vs charter - Charter goal: p95 latency < 500ms in 90 days. - Actual outcome: p95 = 540ms at day 90. - Variance + reason: +8% over target; vendor migration window underestimated by 3 weeks.
## Lessons learned | ID | Lesson statement | Behaviour change | Owner | Target adoption date | Evidence | |-------|-----------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------|----------|----------------------|------------------------------------| | L-001 | Vendor migrations consistently underestimated | Apply 1.5x buffer to PERT estimates on vendor changes | PM Iryna | 2026-07-15 | phoenix-postmortem §4 | | L-002 | Canary feedback loop too slow | Move canary readout from weekly to daily for first 14 days | TL Petro | 2026-06-01 | grafana-q1.json | | L-003 | Trio decisions not logged | Decision-log mandatory artefact per trio session | PM Iryna | 2026-06-15 | trio-session-notes-w12.md |
## Decisions for the next project - Pin vendor SOW v3 before kickoff. - Daily canary readout for first 14 days of rollout.
## Open items + follow-up owners - Document Stripe v2 quirks — Petro — due 2026-06-30.
example.commentary: Each lesson is phrased as a verb+object+measurable signal; owners + dates pinned; open items have follow-up owners; ready for next-project kick-off adoption review.
